title: Pooled-path polish: final-review minors + gate/config guards from the 2026-07-03 plan-2 branch
source: 2026-07-03 plan-2 final whole-branch review (pooled audit + CS pack); all triaged non-blocking
why: Deferred minors plus two operational observations from the final review of the pooled-audit/cross-section branch. None block the shipped branch; two items change what future pooled audits DO by default and deserve prompt attention: (1) the pooled event-floor gate tests raw pooled events (11.9k passes) while the binding quantity is effective-N (~650 fails) — every pooled audit burns the full run even when starved; fix the gate once B0012 settles what effective-N should be. (2) build_transient_pooled_config hardcodes features.cross_sectional true, but B0006 FAILED its pre-registered falsification — future pooled audits carry 8 validated-as-noise features plus a ~273-bar warmup haircut by default; the default needs a human re-decision now that the readout is in.
scope: Pooled audit gate: compare effective-N (not raw N) against the floor once B0012 resolves; until then persist both (B0011) and print the starvation warning into the audit record
build_transient_pooled_config: make features.cross_sectional a parameter/config default informed by the B0006 verdict (human decision), not hardcoded true
run_pooled_equity_d1: broaden regime-parquet fail-loud check (regime_id column exists + nonzero index intersection with events; tz/dtype mismatch currently starves silently with only a print)
Delete dead metrics.threshold_selection key from configs and validate threshold_selection.method as an enum (a typo of inner_cv silently degrades to fixed-threshold)
run_proposal --pooled-universe: warn/refuse when combined with flags it ignores (e.g. --preflight-only)
cs_breadth_200: NaN (not 0.0) during the 200-bar warmup; exclude pre-listing names from the denominator — masked today by cs_mom warmup dropna, becomes real under B0004 late listings
Tests: differentiate the two tickers in the CS-join gated test and assert per-asset values differ (cross-wiring detection); hoist fo_add/fo_drop out of the per-ticker loop

history.reason: logged from plan-2 final whole-branch review

T004D1 pooled audit (2026-07-04): raw gate passed (2,852 > 599) but effective_n_rho1 = 521.7 < 799 - the audit burned a full run on a formally floor-invalid verdict, exactly the B0013 scope item. DA caveat #1 had pre-registered this as FAIL. Priority of the effective-N gate fix rises.
Pooled audit now gates on effective_n_rho1 (cheap --effective-n-only subprocess, fail-loud on measurement failure) before the full run; completed records persist pooled_effective_n. Commit 71b36d6.
effective-N gate scope item shipped (71b36d6); remaining scope items open

Skeptic finding 3 added to scope: pin accounting basis (best-model) into extra_falsification_criteria schema; forbid loose multi-model counts wherever a floor is evaluated (T005R2 evaluated in-scope on loose 83 while base used best-model 42 - inconsistent bases, unexploited only because outcomes were negative).
